name: Crockpot Chicken & Artichoke Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 jars marinated artichoke hearts (reserve 1 jar of the marinade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat dry the chicken pieces.
2. Season with salt, white pepper, and paprika.
3. Brown the chicken in a large frying pan using 1 tablespoon butter.
4. Place mushrooms and drained artichoke hearts at the bottom of the crockpot.
5. Sprinkle with quick-cooking tapioca.
6. Add the browned chicken pieces.
7. Pour in the chicken broth and sherry.
8. Add tarragon.
9. Cover the crockpot and set to Low heat setting.
10. Cook for 7-8 hours, or cook on High for 5 hours.
11. If desired, skip the browning step before adding the remaining ingredients.
